title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: ACCESS MEDFORD SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepting donations of blankets, pillows, and sheets; hygiene items including feminine products and adult diapers and pads; new and gently used winter clothing; and unopened pet food. 332 W 6th Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (458) 488-1220 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 488-1220 Donor Support Team INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
